---
title: "Nan_Bal_Meeting_May23"
author: "Naman Kishan Rastogi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.








########################################## **Dry** ##################################
############################## **Precipitation, ASST and SST to streamflow Q**#############

**with antecedent SST**
**Bayes Factor analysis**
```{r}
set.seed(123) 
rm(list = ls(all=TRUE))  
library(tidyverse) 
library(lubridate)  
library(bnlearn)  
```

**CONVERT DATA INTO NORMAL QUANTILES**
```{r}
NQ <- function(datain){
  emp.cdf <- ecdf(datain)
  ecdf.prob <- emp.cdf(datain)
  max_datain <- max(datain) 
  val_range <- max(datain)-min(datain) 
  #maxrow <- which.max(datain) # row corresponding to max data
  maxrow <- which(datain == max_datain) 
  datain[maxrow]=-Inf
  
  second_max <- max(datain) 
  diff <- max_datain - second_max 
  second_max_prob <- max(ecdf.prob[ecdf.prob<1]) 
  adj_prob <- second_max_prob + (diff/val_range)*(1-second_max_prob)  
  

  ecdf.prob[maxrow] <- adj_prob
  
  norm.quantiles <- qnorm(ecdf.prob,mean = 0, sd = 1)
  return(norm.quantiles)
}


NQ_median.flow <- function(datain,median.flow){
  if (median.flow>max(datain)){
    return(2)
  }
  else{
    datain<- c(datain,median.flow)
    quantiles <- NQ(datain)
    norm.quantile <- quantiles[length(quantiles)]
    return(norm.quantile)
  }
}

```

**Estimate Truncated Normal Parameters**
```{r}
estimate_truncated_normal_parameters <- function(nmean, nsd, upper, lower){
  a <- (lower-nmean)/nsd
  b <- (upper-nmean)/nsd
  trunc.mean = nmean + ((dnorm(a)-dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))*nsd
  if (b==Inf){
    term1 = (a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  if (a==-Inf){
    term1 <- -1*(b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  #term1 <- (b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)) + (-a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  term2 <- -1*((dnorm(b)-dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))**2
  trunc.sd = sqrt(nsd**2 * (1+term1+term2))
  return(list(mean = trunc.mean, sd = trunc.sd))
}
```


**Define Bayesian Network Structure**
```{r}
dag <- model2network("[P][SST][ASST][Q|P:SST:ASST]")
print(dag)
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early/")

png("Grid1BN_DAG.png", width = 1000, height = 800)


plot(dag, 
     main = "Bayesian Network DAG",  
     sub = "Causal Relationships Between Variables",
     col = "black",  
     lwd = 2,  
     cex.main = 1.5,  
     cex.sub = 1.2,  
     cex = 1.3,  
     mar = c(5, 5, 5, 5))  


dev.off()

```

**standard normal Early**
```{r}



library(readr)
input_dir <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early/"

output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}


for (i in 1:4487) {
  
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}

```


**Early Dry**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early/Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- -0.4912692


cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**standard normal peak**
```{r}

library(readr)
input_dir <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Peak///"

output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}
```

**Peak Dry**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Peak/Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- -0.4912692


cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


**standard normal late**
```{r}
library(readr)
input_dir <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Late///"

output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}
```


**Late Dry**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Late/Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- -0.4912692


cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```





**standard normal monsoon**
```{r}
library(readr)
input_dir <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon//"

output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "Normalized_Quantiles")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
to_normal_quantile <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ranks <- rank(x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
  u <- (ranks - 0.5) / n
  z <- qnorm(u)
  return(z)
}
for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_in  <- file.path(input_dir, paste0("grid", i, ".csv"))
  file_out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv"))
  if (!file.exists(file_in)) {
    cat(" Missing:", i, "\n")
    next
  }
  df <- read_csv(file_in, show_col_types = FALSE)
  df_norm <- df
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df_norm[[col]] <- to_normal_quantile(df[[col]])
    }
  }
  write_csv(df_norm, file_out)
  cat("Done grid:", i, "\n")
}
```

**Monsoon Dry**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon/Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- -0.4912692


cv_dir <- "DryCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q <= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("DryCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "DryCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```



########################################## **WET** ##################################
##############################**precipitation ASST and SST to streamflow Q **#############
**with antecedent SST**
**Bayes Factor analysis**
```{r}
set.seed(123) 
rm(list = ls(all=TRUE))  
library(tidyverse) 
library(lubridate)  
library(bnlearn)  
```

**CONVERT DATA INTO NORMAL QUANTILES**
```{r}
NQ <- function(datain){
  emp.cdf <- ecdf(datain)
  ecdf.prob <- emp.cdf(datain)
  max_datain <- max(datain) 
  val_range <- max(datain)-min(datain) 
  #maxrow <- which.max(datain) # row corresponding to max data
  maxrow <- which(datain == max_datain) 
  datain[maxrow]=-Inf
  
  second_max <- max(datain) 
  diff <- max_datain - second_max 
  second_max_prob <- max(ecdf.prob[ecdf.prob<1]) 
  adj_prob <- second_max_prob + (diff/val_range)*(1-second_max_prob)  
  

  ecdf.prob[maxrow] <- adj_prob
  
  norm.quantiles <- qnorm(ecdf.prob,mean = 0, sd = 1)
  return(norm.quantiles)
}


NQ_median.flow <- function(datain,median.flow){
  if (median.flow>max(datain)){
    return(2)
  }
  else{
    datain<- c(datain,median.flow)
    quantiles <- NQ(datain)
    norm.quantile <- quantiles[length(quantiles)]
    return(norm.quantile)
  }
}

```

**Estimate Truncated Normal Parameters**
```{r}
estimate_truncated_normal_parameters <- function(nmean, nsd, upper, lower){
  a <- (lower-nmean)/nsd
  b <- (upper-nmean)/nsd
  trunc.mean = nmean + ((dnorm(a)-dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))*nsd
  if (b==Inf){
    term1 = (a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  if (a==-Inf){
    term1 <- -1*(b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  #term1 <- (b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)) + (-a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  term2 <- -1*((dnorm(b)-dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))**2
  trunc.sd = sqrt(nsd**2 * (1+term1+term2))
  return(list(mean = trunc.mean, sd = trunc.sd))
}
```


**Define Bayesian Network Structure**
```{r}
dag <- model2network("[P][SST][ASST][Q|P:SST:ASST]")
print(dag)
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early/")


png("Grid1BN_DAG.png", width = 1000, height = 800)


plot(dag, 
     main = "Bayesian Network DAG",  
     sub = "Causal Relationships Between Variables",
     col = "black",  
     lwd = 2,  
     cex.main = 1.5,  
     cex.sub = 1.2,  
     cex = 1.3,  
     mar = c(5, 5, 5, 5))  


dev.off()

print("Bayesian Network DAG saved as 'Bayesian_Network_DAG.png' with improved visibility")

```

**Early Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early/Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```





**Peak Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Peak/Normalized_Quantiles//")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Late Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Late//Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Monsoon Wet**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon//Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.DJF <- 0.4912692


cv_dir <- "WetCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.DJF), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    flood_threshold = check.DJF,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("WetCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "WetCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```







########################################## **Normal** ##################################
##############################**Precipitation, ASST and SST to streamflow Q**#############

**with antecedent SST**
**Bayes Factor analysis**
```{r}
set.seed(123) 
rm(list = ls(all=TRUE))  
library(tidyverse) 
library(lubridate)  
library(bnlearn)  
```

**CONVERT DATA INTO NORMAL QUANTILES**
```{r}
NQ <- function(datain){
  emp.cdf <- ecdf(datain)
  ecdf.prob <- emp.cdf(datain)
  max_datain <- max(datain) 
  val_range <- max(datain)-min(datain) 
  #maxrow <- which.max(datain) # row corresponding to max data
  maxrow <- which(datain == max_datain) 
  datain[maxrow]=-Inf
  
  second_max <- max(datain) 
  diff <- max_datain - second_max 
  second_max_prob <- max(ecdf.prob[ecdf.prob<1]) 
  adj_prob <- second_max_prob + (diff/val_range)*(1-second_max_prob)  
  

  ecdf.prob[maxrow] <- adj_prob
  
  norm.quantiles <- qnorm(ecdf.prob,mean = 0, sd = 1)
  return(norm.quantiles)
}


NQ_median.flow <- function(datain,median.flow){
  if (median.flow>max(datain)){
    return(2)
  }
  else{
    datain<- c(datain,median.flow)
    quantiles <- NQ(datain)
    norm.quantile <- quantiles[length(quantiles)]
    return(norm.quantile)
  }
}

```

**Estimate Truncated Normal Parameters**
```{r}
estimate_truncated_normal_parameters <- function(nmean, nsd, upper, lower){
  a <- (lower-nmean)/nsd
  b <- (upper-nmean)/nsd
  trunc.mean = nmean + ((dnorm(a)-dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))*nsd
  if (b==Inf){
    term1 = (a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  if (a==-Inf){
    term1 <- -1*(b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  }
  #term1 <- (b*dnorm(b))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)) + (-a*dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a))
  term2 <- -1*((dnorm(b)-dnorm(a))/(pnorm(b)-pnorm(a)))**2
  trunc.sd = sqrt(nsd**2 * (1+term1+term2))
  return(list(mean = trunc.mean, sd = trunc.sd))
}
```


**Define Bayesian Network Structure**
```{r}
dag <- model2network("[P][SST][ASST][Q|P:SST:ASST]")
print(dag)
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early/")


png("Grid1BN_DAG.png", width = 1000, height = 800)


plot(dag, 
     main = "Bayesian Network DAG",  
     sub = "Causal Relationships Between Variables",
     col = "black",  
     lwd = 2,  
     cex.main = 1.5,  
     cex.sub = 1.2,  
     cex = 1.3,  
     mar = c(5, 5, 5, 5))  


dev.off()

```

**Early Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Early///Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower_limit = check.lower,
    upper_limit = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)




```





**Peak Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Peak///Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower_limit = check.lower,
    upper_limit = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Late Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Late////Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower_limit = check.lower,
    upper_limit = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




**Monsoon Normal**
```{r}

library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon////Normalized_Quantiles/")


check.lower <- -0.4912692
check.upper <-  0.4912692


cv_dir <- "NormalCV_Pred"
if (!dir.exists(cv_dir)) {
  dir.create(cv_dir)
}


correlation_summary <- data.frame(Grid_Number = integer(), Correlation = numeric())
bayes_stats_summary <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_normalized <- paste0("grid", i, "_normalized.csv")
  file_actual <- paste0("../grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (!file.exists(file_normalized) || !file.exists(file_actual)) {
    next
  }


  data.Q <- read.csv(file_normalized)
  data <- read_csv(file_actual, show_col_types = FALSE)


  if (!("Q" %in% colnames(data))) {
    next
  }


  model <- bn.fit(dag, data.Q)
  joint <- gbn2mvnorm(model)


  mutSST <- mutilated(model, evidence = list(SST = 0))
  param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], Inf, 1)
  param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["SST"], joint$sigma["SST", "SST"], -1, -Inf)

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
  query.high <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST > 0)))

  mutSST$SST <- list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
  query.low <- sapply(1:1000, function(q) cpquery(mutSST, event = (Q >= check.lower & Q <= check.upper), evidence = (SST < 0)))

  query.high[query.high == 0] <- 1e-12
  query.low[query.low == 0] <- 1e-12

  stat1 <- data.frame(
    num = median(query.high),
    deno = median(query.low),
    Bayes.factor = log10(mean(query.high) / mean(query.low)),
    lower_limit = check.lower,
    upper_limit = check.upper,
    season = "JJAS Monsoon",
    variable = "SST",
    Grid = paste0("grid", i)
  )

  print(stat1)


  bayes_stats_summary <- rbind(bayes_stats_summary, stat1)


  pred_loo <- numeric(nrow(data.Q))
  
  for (j in 1:nrow(data.Q)) {
    train_data <- data.Q[-j, ]
    test_data <- data.Q[j, , drop = FALSE]
    
    model_loo <- bn.fit(dag, train_data)
    pred_loo[j] <- predict(model_loo, node = 'Q', test_data, method = 'bayes-lw')
  }
  

  Q_pred_actual <- quantile(data$Q, pnorm(pred_loo), type = 8)
  

  correlation_value <- cor(data$Q, Q_pred_actual, use = "complete.obs")
  

  cat("Grid", i, "- Correlation between observed and predicted Q:", round(correlation_value, 3), "\n")


  cv_df <- data.frame(Q_Obs = data$Q, Q_CV = Q_pred_actual)
  write.csv(cv_df, file = file.path(cv_dir, paste0("NormalCV_Grid", i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  

  correlation_summary <- rbind(correlation_summary,
                               data.frame(Grid_Number = i, Correlation = correlation_value))
}


write.csv(correlation_summary, "NormalCV_Correl.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(bayes_stats_summary, "Normal_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```



**calculate correlation betweeen the parents and child for asst sst q, p model**
```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor//Early//////")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_ASST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_SST = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("ASST", "SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$ASST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$SST, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_ASST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_ASST_Q = corr_vals[3],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[4],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[5],
                                              Corr_ASST_SST = corr_vals[6]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")







library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Peak/////")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_ASST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_SST = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("ASST", "SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$ASST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$SST, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_ASST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_ASST_Q = corr_vals[3],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[4],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[5],
                                              Corr_ASST_SST = corr_vals[6]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")






library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Late//////")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_ASST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_SST = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("ASST", "SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$ASST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$SST, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_ASST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_ASST_Q = corr_vals[3],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[4],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[5],
                                              Corr_ASST_SST = corr_vals[6]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")





library(readr)
library(dplyr)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon/")


correlation_results <- data.frame(
  Grid_Number = integer(),
  Corr_ASST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_SST_Q = numeric(),
  Corr_Q_P = numeric(),
  Corr_ASST_SST = numeric()
)


for (i in 1:4487) {
  file_name <- paste0("grid", i, ".csv")
  

  if (file.exists(file_name)) {

    data <- read_csv(file_name, show_col_types = FALSE)
    

    required_cols <- c("ASST", "SST", "P", "Q")
    if (all(required_cols %in% names(data))) {
      

      corr_vals <- c(
        cor(data$ASST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$SST, data$Q, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$Q, data$P, use = "complete.obs"),
        cor(data$ASST, data$SST, use = "complete.obs")
      )
      

      correlation_results <- rbind(correlation_results, 
                                   data.frame(Grid_Number = i,
                                              Corr_ASST_P = corr_vals[1],
                                              Corr_SST_P = corr_vals[2],
                                              Corr_ASST_Q = corr_vals[3],
                                              Corr_SST_Q = corr_vals[4],
                                              Corr_Q_P = corr_vals[5],
                                              Corr_ASST_SST = corr_vals[6]))
    } else {
      cat("Skipping grid", i, ": Missing required columns\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("File missing:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}


write_csv(correlation_results, "Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

cat("Done! Total grids processed:", nrow(correlation_results), "\n")

```




**data merging **
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(readr)

setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon//Normalized_Quantiles/")

bf_data <- read_csv("Wet_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv") %>%
  select(Grid, Bayes.factor)

cor_data <- read_csv("WetCV_Correl.csv")

grid_index <- read_csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST//grid_index.csv")

corr_sstpq <- read_csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon/Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

merged_bf <- left_join(grid_index, bf_data, by = "Grid")

merged_corr <- left_join(merged_bf, cor_data, by = "Grid_Number")

final_data <- left_join(merged_corr, corr_sstpq, by = "Grid_Number")

final_data <- final_data %>%
  select(Lat, Lon, Grid, Grid_Number, Bayes.factor, Correlation,
         Corr_ASST_P,Corr_SST_P,Corr_ASST_Q,Corr_SST_Q,Corr_Q_P,Corr_ASST_SST)

write_csv(final_data, "Wet_combined_BF_Corr.csv")




library(dplyr)
library(readr)

setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon/Normalized_Quantiles/")

bf_data <- read_csv("Dry_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv") %>%
  select(Grid, Bayes.factor)

cor_data <- read_csv("DryCV_Correl.csv")

grid_index <- read_csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST//grid_index.csv")

corr_sstpq <- read_csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/Monsoon/Corre_Grid_PQ.csv")

merged_bf <- left_join(grid_index, bf_data, by = "Grid")

merged_corr <- left_join(merged_bf, cor_data, by = "Grid_Number")

final_data <- left_join(merged_corr, corr_sstpq, by = "Grid_Number")

final_data <- final_data %>%
  select(Lat, Lon, Grid, Grid_Number, Bayes.factor, Correlation,
         Corr_ASST_P,Corr_SST_P,Corr_ASST_Q,Corr_SST_Q,Corr_Q_P,Corr_ASST_SST)

write_csv(final_data, "Dry_combined_BF_Corr.csv")





```




**only correlation plot correct nkr mar 23**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
library(sf)

base_path <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/"
seasons    <- c("Early","Peak","Late","Monsoon")      
condition  <- "Dry"                                   
fix_lon    <- function(x) ifelse(x < 0, x + 360, x)

lon_win <- c(30, 300)
lat_win <- c(-15, 25)


world2_map <- map_data("world2")

india_boundary <- st_read(
    "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Shapefiles/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp",
    quiet = TRUE
) |>
    st_transform(4326) |>
    st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES","DATELINEOFFSET=180")) |>
    st_shift_longitude()

india_boundary_df <- india_boundary |>
    st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") |>
    st_cast("POLYGON") |>
    mutate(id = row_number()) |>
    st_cast("LINESTRING") |>
    st_coordinates() |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    rename(lon = X, lat = Y) |>
    mutate(group = L1,
           lon   = fix_lon(lon))     

read_season_data <- function(season){
    path <- file.path(base_path, season, "Normalized_Quantiles")
    fp   <- file.path(path, paste0(condition, "_combined_BF_Corr.csv"))
    if (!file.exists(fp)) return(NULL)
    
    read.csv(fp) |>
        select(Lat, Lon, Grid, Grid_Number, Bayes.factor, Corr_SST_Q) |>
        mutate(Condition = condition, Phase = season)
}

all_data <- purrr::map_dfr(seasons, read_season_data) |>
    mutate(
        Phase     = factor(Phase, levels = seasons),
        Condition = factor(Condition, levels = condition),   
        lon       = fix_lon(Lon),
        lat       = Lat
    )

Dry <- all_data %>% filter(Condition == "Dry")


n_years <- 30   

is_sig95 <- function(r, n){
    if (!is.finite(r) || n <= 2) return(FALSE)
    tval <- r * sqrt((n - 2) / (1 - r^2))
    abs(tval) >= qt(0.975, df = n - 2)
}

Dry_sig <- Dry |>
    mutate(
        sig95   = vapply(Corr_SST_Q, is_sig95, logical(1), n = n_years),
        pos_sig = sig95 & (Corr_SST_Q > 0),
        neg_sig = sig95 & (Corr_SST_Q < 0)
    )

panel_labels <- data.frame(
  Phase = factor(seasons, levels = seasons),
  label = c("(a)", "(b)", "(c)", "(d)")
)



p_corr_2x2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_raster(data = Dry_sig,
                aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Corr_SST_Q)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1),
                         name = "Correlation") +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
  barwidth = unit(12, "cm"),    
  barheight = unit(0.5, "cm")
  ))+
    geom_polygon(data = world2_map,
                 aes(long, lat, group = group),
                 fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_path(data = india_boundary_df,
              aes(lon, lat, group = group),
              color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_point(data = subset(Dry_sig, pos_sig),
               aes(lon, lat),
               shape = 4, color = "red", size = 1.3, stroke = 1) +
    geom_point(data = subset(Dry_sig, neg_sig),
               aes(lon, lat),
               shape = 4, color = "blue", size = 1.3, stroke = 1) +
geom_text(data = panel_labels,
          aes(x = lon_win[1] + 5, 
              y = lat_win[1] + 3,   
              label = label),
          color = "red",
          size = 6,
          fontface = "bold",
          hjust = 0,
          vjust = 0)+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = lon_win, ylim = lat_win, expand = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(lon_win[1], lon_win[2], 30)) +
    labs(
        title = "Correlation between SST and Streamflow (Q)",
        x     = "Longitude",
        y     = "Latitude"
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ Phase, ncol = 2) +   
    theme(
        plot.title   = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title   = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text    = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray25", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
        panel.grid   = element_line(size = 0.2),
        strip.text   = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title    = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.text     = element_text(size = 12)
    )

ggsave(filename = "Corr_SST_Q_Dry_sig95_2x2.png",
       plot = p_corr_2x2,
       path = base_path,
       width = 20, height = 7, dpi = 400, bg = "white")

```

**teleconnection regions**
```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)

setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data///")

# Load world2 map (0–360° longitude layout)
world_map <- map_data("world2")

# Load and transform India boundary
india_boundary <- st_read("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Shapefiles/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp") %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES", "DATELINEOFFSET=180")) %>%
  st_shift_longitude()

# Extract coordinates for plotting
india_boundary_df <- india_boundary %>%
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") %>%
  st_cast("POLYGON") %>%
  mutate(id = row_number()) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING") %>%
  st_coordinates() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) %>%
  mutate(group = L1)

# Define region boxes
region_boxes <- data.frame(
  Region = c("Niño1+2", "Niño3", "Niño4", "West Pacific", "IOD-West", "IOD-East"),
  xmin = c(270, 210, 200, 120, 50, 90),
  xmax = c(280, 270, 210, 160, 70, 110),
  ymin = c(-10, -5, -5, -10, -10, -10),
  ymax = c(0, 5, 5, 10, 10, 0),
  label_x = c(275, 240, 205, 140, 60, 100),
  label_y = c(-5, 0, 0, 0, 0, -5)
)

# Create the plot
p <- ggplot() +
  # Add land polygons
  geom_polygon(data = world_map, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "saddlebrown", color = "black", size = 0.2) +

  # Add India boundary in dark green
  geom_path(data = india_boundary_df, aes(x = lon, y = lat, group = group),
            color = "darkgreen", size = 0.6) +

  # Draw region boxes
  geom_rect(data = region_boxes,
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax,
                ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
            color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +

  # Add labels with white background
  geom_label(data = region_boxes,
             aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = Region),
             color = "red", fill = "white", fontface = "bold",
             label.size = NA, size = 4) +

  # Axis breaks
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 360, by = 60)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-60, 75, by = 15)) +

  # Coordinate and styling
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 360), ylim = c(-70, 80), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "skyblue"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Major Oceanic and Atmospheric Teleconnection Regions",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )

# Save the plot
ggsave("Teleconnection_Regions_World2Map_withIndia.png", p,
       width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

# Display
print(p)

```




**PLOT WET AND DRY TOGTHER bayes factor**

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(maps)
library(sf)
library(grid)


base_path <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/"
seasons   <- c("Early","Peak","Late","Monsoon")
lon_win   <- c(30, 300)
lat_win   <- c(-15, 25)

fix_lon <- function(x) ifelse(x < 0, x + 360, x)


world2_map <- map_data("world2")

india_boundary <- st_read(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Shapefiles/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp",
  quiet = TRUE
) |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES","DATELINEOFFSET=180")) |>
  st_shift_longitude()

india_boundary_df <- india_boundary |>
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") |>
  st_cast("POLYGON") |>
  mutate(id = row_number()) |>
  st_cast("LINESTRING") |>
  st_coordinates() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) |>
  mutate(group = L1, lon = fix_lon(lon))


read_condition_data <- function(condition, base_path, seasons) {
  read_season <- function(season) {
    path <- file.path(base_path, season, "Normalized_Quantiles")
    fp   <- file.path(path, paste0(condition, "_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv"))
    if (!file.exists(fp)) return(NULL)
    read.csv(fp) |>
      dplyr::select(Lat, Lon, Grid, Bayes.factor) |>
      dplyr::mutate(Condition = condition, Phase = season)
  }

  df <- purrr::map_dfr(seasons, read_season)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) stop("No files found for condition = ", condition)

  df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Phase = factor(Phase, levels = seasons),
      lon   = fix_lon(Lon),
      lat   = Lat
    )
}

get_season_df <- function(df, season) {
  df %>% dplyr::filter(Phase == season)
}


make_bf_panel_one <- function(df_one, show_lat_axis = FALSE, show_lon_axis = FALSE, panel_letter = NULL) {

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_raster(data = df_one, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2), name = "Bayes Factor"
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = world2_map,
      aes(long, lat, group = group),
      fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25
    ) +
    geom_path(
      data = india_boundary_df,
      aes(lon, lat, group = group),
      color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor > 1),
      aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "darkred", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.4
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor >= 0.5, Bayes.factor < 1),
      aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "coral2", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.4
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor <= -0.5, Bayes.factor > -1),
      aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "purple", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.4
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor < -1),
      aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "blue", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.4
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = lon_win, ylim = lat_win, expand = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 2.0),
      panel.grid = element_line(size = 0.2),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "mm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line()
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = lon_win[1] + 2, y = lat_win[1] + 1.5,
      label = panel_letter, fontface = "bold", size = 7, color = "red",
      hjust = 0, vjust = 0
    ) +
    labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude")

  if (!show_lon_axis) {
    p <- p + theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = NA),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(color = NA),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = NA)
    )
  }

  if (!show_lat_axis) {
    p <- p + theme(
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = NA),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(color = NA),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = NA)
    )
  }

  p
}


Dry <- read_condition_data("Dry", base_path, seasons)
Wet <- read_condition_data("Wet", base_path, seasons)


letters_vec <- c("(a)", "(b)", "(c)", "(d)", "(e)", "(f)", "(g)", "(h)")
row_plots <- vector("list", length(seasons))

for (i in seq_along(seasons)) {

  s <- seasons[i]
  dfL <- get_season_df(Dry, s)
  dfR <- get_season_df(Wet, s)

  show_lon <- (s == "Monsoon")

  pL <- make_bf_panel_one(
    dfL,
    show_lat_axis = TRUE,
    show_lon_axis = show_lon,
    panel_letter = letters_vec[(i - 1) * 2 + 1]
  )

  pR <- make_bf_panel_one(
    dfR,
    show_lat_axis = FALSE,
    show_lon_axis = show_lon,
    panel_letter = letters_vec[(i - 1) * 2 + 2]
  )

  row_pair <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    pL, pR,
    ncol = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1),
    align = "hv",
    axis = "tblr"
  )

  row_label <- ggdraw() +
    draw_label(
      s,
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 28,
      angle = 270,
      x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
      hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5
    )

  row_plots[[i]] <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    row_pair, row_label,
    ncol = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1, 0.045),
    align = "h",
    axis = "tb"
  )
}


legend_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(
    data = Dry %>% filter(Phase == "Early"),
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2)
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      title = "Bayes Factor",
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust = 0,
      label.position = "bottom",
      barwidth = unit(20, "cm"),
      barheight = unit(1.3, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold")
  )

legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)


col_titles <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Dry", fontface = "bold", size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Wet", fontface = "bold", size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
  ggdraw(),
  ncol = 3,
  rel_widths = c(1, 1, 0.045)
)


rows_combined <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  plotlist = row_plots,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1),
  align = "v",
  axis = "lr",
  greedy = TRUE
)

final_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  col_titles,
  rows_combined,
  legend_grob,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(0.05, 1, 0.08)
)


ggsave(
  "BF_Anomalies_Dry_vs_Wet_4x2WITH.png",
  final_plot,
  width = 26,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 400,
  bg = "white"
)

# ggsave("BF_Anomalies_Dry_vs_Wet_4x2.pdf", final_plot, width = 26, height = 17)
```










**NORMAL YEARS bayes factor plot**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(maps)
library(sf)
library(grid)


base_path <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P_ASST/"
seasons   <- c("Early","Peak","Late","Monsoon")
lon_win   <- c(30, 300)
lat_win   <- c(-15, 25)

fix_lon <- function(x) ifelse(x < 0, x + 360, x)


world2_map <- map_data("world2")

india_boundary <- st_read(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Shapefiles/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp",
  quiet = TRUE
) |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES","DATELINEOFFSET=180")) |>
  st_shift_longitude()

india_boundary_df <- india_boundary |>
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") |> st_cast("POLYGON") |>
  mutate(id = row_number()) |>
  st_cast("LINESTRING") |>
  st_coordinates() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) |>
  mutate(group = L1, lon = fix_lon(lon))


read_condition_data <- function(condition, base_path, seasons) {
  read_season <- function(season){
    path <- file.path(base_path, season,"Normalized_Quantiles")
    fp   <- file.path(path, paste0(condition, "_Bayes_Factor_Grids.csv"))
    if (!file.exists(fp)) return(NULL)
    read.csv(fp) |>
      dplyr::select(Lat, Lon, Grid, Bayes.factor) |>
      dplyr::mutate(Condition = condition, Phase = season)
  }
  df <- purrr::map_dfr(seasons, read_season)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) stop("No files found for condition = ", condition)
  df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Phase = factor(Phase, levels = seasons),
      lon   = fix_lon(Lon),
      lat   = Lat
    )
}

get_season_df <- function(df, season) df %>% dplyr::filter(Phase == season)

make_bf_panel_one <- function(df_one, show_lat_axis = FALSE, show_lon_axis = FALSE, panel_letter = NULL) {
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_raster(data = df_one, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2), name = "Bayes Factor") +
    geom_polygon(data = world2_map, aes(long, lat, group = group),
                 fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_path(data = india_boundary_df, aes(lon, lat, group = group),
              color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor >  1),
               aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "darkred", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
    geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor >= 0.5, Bayes.factor <  1),
               aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "coral2", size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
    geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor <= -0.5, Bayes.factor > -1),
               aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "purple",  size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
    geom_point(data = df_one %>% dplyr::filter(Bayes.factor < -1),
               aes(lon, lat), shape = 4, color = "blue",    size = 1.4, stroke = 1.0) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = lon_win, ylim = lat_win, expand = FALSE) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.border  = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 2.0),
      panel.grid    = element_line(size = 0.2),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm")
    ) +
    annotate("text",
             x = lon_win[1] + 2, y = lat_win[1] + 1.5,
             label = panel_letter, fontface = "bold", size = 7, color = "red",
             hjust = 0, vjust = 0)
  
  if (show_lat_axis && show_lon_axis) {
    p <- p +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60), name = "Longitude") +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10), name = "Latitude") +
      theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
            axis.ticks = element_line())
  } else if (show_lat_axis) {
    p <- p +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60)) +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10), name = "Latitude") +
      theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.x = element_blank(),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
            axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.y = element_line())
  } else if (show_lon_axis) {
    p <- p +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60), name = "Longitude") +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10)) +
      theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
            axis.title.y = element_blank(),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
            axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
  } else {
    p <- p +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(60, 300, 60)) +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 20, 10)) +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks = element_blank())
  }
  
  return(p)
}


Normal <- read_condition_data("Normal", base_path, seasons)


panels <- vector("list", 4)
letters_vec <- c("(a)", "(b)", "(c)", "(d)")

for (i in seq_along(seasons)) {
  s <- seasons[i]
  df <- get_season_df(Normal, s)
  
  
  show_lat_axis <- (i == 1)  
  show_lon_axis <- (s == "Monsoon")  
  
  p <- make_bf_panel_one(df, 
                        show_lat_axis = show_lat_axis, 
                        show_lon_axis = show_lon_axis,
                        panel_letter = letters_vec[i])
  
  panels[[i]] <- p
}

legend_grob <- ggplotGrob(
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(data = Normal %>% filter(Phase == "Early"), 
                aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")) +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
      title = "Bayes Factor",
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust = 0,
      label.position = "bottom",
      barwidth = unit(15, "cm"), 
      barheight = unit(0.8, "cm")
    ))
)$grobs[[which(sapply(ggplotGrob(
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(data = Normal %>% filter(Phase == "Early"), 
                aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Bayes Factor"))
)$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")]]

grid_1x4 <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = panels, ncol = 1, align = 'v')

col_title <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("Normal", fontface = "bold", size = 30, hjust = 0.5)

season_labels <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Early",   fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Peak",    fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Late",    fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Monsoon", fontface = "bold", size = 30, angle = 270, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1, 1)
)

grid_with_right <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  grid_1x4, season_labels,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(1, 0.06)
)

final_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  col_title,
  grid_with_right,
  legend_grob,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(0.06, 1, 0.10)
)

ggsave("BF_Anomalies_Normal_1x4.png", final_plot,
       width = 20, height = 15, dpi = 400, bg = "white") 
# ggsave("BF_Anomalies_Normal_1x4.pdf", final_plot, width = 12, height = 22)
```




**plotting streamflow time series figure 3**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

base_path   <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/"

dir_early   <- file.path(base_path, "Early")
dir_peak    <- file.path(base_path, "Peak")
dir_late    <- file.path(base_path, "Late")
dir_monsoon <- file.path(base_path, "Monsoon")

years <- 1987:2019   


phase_labels <- c(
  Early   = "Early (May–Jun)",
  Peak    = "Peak (Jul–Aug)",
  Late    = "Late (Sep–Oct)",
  Monsoon = "Monsoon (Jun–Sep)"
)


read_q_phase <- function(dir, phase_name) {
  df <- read.csv(file.path(dir, "grid1.csv"))
  tibble(
    Year  = years,
    Q     = df$Q,
    Phase = phase_name
  )
}


df_all <- bind_rows(
  read_q_phase(dir_early,   "Early"),
  read_q_phase(dir_peak,    "Peak"),
  read_q_phase(dir_late,    "Late"),
  read_q_phase(dir_monsoon, "Monsoon")
)
```
