```{r}
df_all_class <- df_all %>%
  group_by(Phase) %>%
  mutate(
    q30 = quantile(Q, 0.30, na.rm = TRUE),
    q70 = quantile(Q, 0.70, na.rm = TRUE),
    Regime = case_when(
      Q <= q30 ~ "Dry",
      Q >= q70 ~ "Wet",
      TRUE     ~ "Normal"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_label = factor(phase_labels[Phase],
                         levels = phase_labels)  
  )

thresh_df <- df_all_class %>%
  group_by(Phase, Phase_label) %>%
  summarise(
    q30 = first(q30),
    q70 = first(q70),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


x_label_pos <- min(df_all_class$Year) + 1


p <- ggplot(df_all_class, aes(x = Year, y = Q)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Regime), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Dry"    = "red",
      "Normal" = "grey30",
      "Wet"    = "blue"
    ),
    name = "Regime"
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(yintercept = q30),
    color = "gray70",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(yintercept = q70),
    color = "gray10",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(x = x_label_pos, y = q30, label = "30th"),
    color = "black",
    hjust = 0, vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(x = x_label_pos, y = q70, label = "70th"),
    color = "black",
    hjust = 0, vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Phase_label, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Streamflow at Bahadurabad by Monsoon Phase",
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Streamflow, Q (m³/s)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(df_all_class$Year), max(df_all_class$Year), by = 4),
    minor_breaks = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.35),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "grey40", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 14),
    
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  file.path(base_path, "Q_timeseries_2x2_regimes_with_thresholds.png"),
  p, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 400, bg = "white"
)

```


**plotting precipitation time series**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

base_path   <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Data/Bayes_Factor/Yearly_Gridded_SST_Q_P/"

dir_early   <- file.path(base_path, "Early")
dir_peak    <- file.path(base_path, "Peak")
dir_late    <- file.path(base_path, "Late")
dir_monsoon <- file.path(base_path, "Monsoon")

years <- 1987:2019   


phase_labels <- c(
  Early   = "Early (May–Jun)",
  Peak    = "Peak (Jul–Aug)",
  Late    = "Late (Sep–Oct)",
  Monsoon = "Monsoon (Jun–Sep)"
)


read_q_phase <- function(dir, phase_name) {
  df <- read.csv(file.path(dir, "grid1.csv"))
  tibble(
    Year  = years,
    P     = (df$P)/10000,
    Phase = phase_name
  )
}


df_all <- bind_rows(
  read_q_phase(dir_early,   "Early"),
  read_q_phase(dir_peak,    "Peak"),
  read_q_phase(dir_late,    "Late"),
  read_q_phase(dir_monsoon, "Monsoon")
)


df_all_class <- df_all %>%
  group_by(Phase) %>%
  mutate(
    q30 = quantile(P, 0.30, na.rm = TRUE),
    q70 = quantile(P, 0.70, na.rm = TRUE),
    Regime = case_when(
      P <= q30 ~ "Dry",
      P >= q70 ~ "Wet",
      TRUE     ~ "Normal"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_label = factor(phase_labels[Phase],
                         levels = phase_labels)  
  )

thresh_df <- df_all_class %>%
  group_by(Phase, Phase_label) %>%
  summarise(
    q30 = first(q30),
    q70 = first(q70),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


x_label_pos <- min(df_all_class$Year) + 1


p <- ggplot(df_all_class, aes(x = Year, y = P)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray50", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Regime), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Dry"    = "red",
      "Normal" = "grey30",
      "Wet"    = "blue"
    ),
    name = "Regime"
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(yintercept = q30),
    color = "gray70",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(yintercept = q70),
    color = "gray10",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(x = x_label_pos, y = q30, label = "30th"),
    color = "black",
    hjust = 0, vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = thresh_df,
    aes(x = x_label_pos, y = q70, label = "70th"),
    color = "black",
    hjust = 0, vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
facet_wrap(~ Phase_label, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
  title = "Seasonal Precipitation Time Series (1987-2019)",
  x     = "Year",
  y     = expression("Precipitation, P (" * 10^4 * " mm)")
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(df_all_class$Year), max(df_all_class$Year), by = 4),
    minor_breaks = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.35),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "grey40", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 14),
    
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  file.path(base_path, "P_timeseries_2x2_regimes_with_thresholds.png"),
  p, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 400, bg = "white"
)

```
